install.note: CLI coding agent by Moonshot AI (Kimi). The binary is `kimi` (curl installs to ~/.kimi-code/bin and prepends it to PATH; restart the shell or source the rc file before verifying). Built on Pi's pi-tui TUI library but a SEPARATE product — do NOT install `pi` or `@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent`. On Windows, Git for Windows is required (Kimi Code uses bundled Git Bash); set KIMI_SHELL_PATH if bash.exe is in a custom location.

blocked_regions.zh-CN: code.kimi.com is mainland-China-reachable, and the curl installer downloads the binary directly from code.kimi.com/kimi-code/binaries (NOT GitHub Releases), so it works in mainland China without a mirror. npm install also works via npmmirror if preferred: `npm install -g @moonshot-ai/kimi-code --registry=https://registry.npmmirror.com`.

first_run.description: On first launch run `/login` inside Kimi Code and choose Kimi Code OAuth or a Moonshot AI Open Platform API key. Any OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible provider can also be added via the [providers.<name>] table in config.toml.
